sections.paragraph:
Original: רוּק

Transliteration: rûq

Phonetic: rook

BDB Definition:

  1. to make empty, empty out
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to empty, keep empty or hungry
      2. to pour out or down
      3. to empty out
    2. (Hophal) to be emptied out

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2161

Part(s) of speech: Verb
